clips.title: White Room
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, muted restrained palette, calm, uncluttered. Present day. An empty white room, a single wooden chair, a bare polished floor, one soft shadow. Day, quiet. A person in simple neutral clothing stands alone near the chair, still, composed. Nothing else, clean lines, soft shadow. Soft even light, minimal grade. Static wide. Serene minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Horizon
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, muted restrained palette, calm, uncluttered. Present day. A vast calm sea meeting a pale sky at a single clean horizon line, nothing else. Day, still. A person in simple clothing stands small at the lower edge of the frame facing the sea, tiny against the expanse. Flat water, soft haze, empty sky. Soft diffuse light, minimal grade. Static wide. Contemplative minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Steps
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, muted restrained palette, calm, uncluttered. Present day. A clean concrete stairway against a plain pale wall, strong simple geometry, a single crisp shadow line. Day. A person in neutral clothing walks up the bare steps, small in the frame, composed. Smooth concrete, one shadow, empty space. Hard clean daylight, minimal grade. Slow dolly in. Geometric minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Color Field
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, bold single-color backdrop, calm, uncluttered. Present day. A bold flat single-color wall filling the frame, nothing else, crisp edges. Day. A person in simple neutral clothing stands against the colored wall, still, one hand at their side, composed. Just the flat color, a soft shadow. Soft even light, minimal grade. Static wide. Striking minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Expanse
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, muted restrained palette, calm, uncluttered. Present day. A vast empty pale desert under a plain soft sky, smooth sand, a single clean horizon. Day, still. A person in simple clothing stands tiny in the lower frame, dwarfed by the emptiness, composed. Smooth sand, faint ripples, empty sky. Soft diffuse light, minimal grade. Static wide. Meditative minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: The Stool
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, muted restrained palette, calm, uncluttered. Present day. A seamless neutral studio backdrop, a single simple stool, nothing else, one soft shadow. Day. A person in plain clothing sits on the stool in the center of empty space, still, hands on knees, composed. Just the stool, empty backdrop. Soft even studio light, minimal grade. Slow dolly in. Quiet minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Window
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, muted restrained palette, calm, uncluttered. Present day. A bare pale room, a single window casting a clean rectangle of light, an empty wall. Day, quiet. A person in neutral clothing stands by the window in the light, still, gazing out, composed. Just the light rectangle, a soft shadow, empty wall. Soft window light, minimal grade. Slow dolly in. Tranquil minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Whiteout
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, muted restrained palette, calm, uncluttered. Winter. A vast empty white snowfield blending into a pale white sky, almost no horizon, nothing else. Day, still. A person in a simple coat stands alone as a small dark shape in the white expanse, composed. Pure white space, faint tracks, soft haze. Flat soft light, minimal grade. Static wide. Stark minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Corridor
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, muted restrained palette, calm, uncluttered. Present day. A long clean empty corridor, plain pale walls, a smooth floor, simple vanishing-point symmetry. Day. A person in neutral clothing walks down the center of the corridor, small in the frame, composed. Bare walls, one soft shadow, empty space. Soft even light, minimal grade. Slow dolly in. Symmetrical minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.

clips.title: Overhead
clips.prompt: Clean minimalist style, vast negative space, simple flat composition, muted restrained palette, calm, uncluttered, top-down. Present day. A clean plain floor seen from directly overhead, simple neutral tiles, lots of empty space. Day. A person in plain clothing lies or stands centered on the empty floor seen from above, small in the frame, composed. Bare floor, one soft shadow, empty space. Soft even light, minimal grade. Static overhead. Graphic minimalist aesthetic, 24fps.
